free_text: Evaluation of neutron induced cross sections for P-31
by means of statistical model and coupled channel
Coupled channel optical model (CCOM) and statistical
sections on P-31 were done, fitting the available
experimental data with a single set of parameters.
The same optical model parameters were used for the
CCOM calculations and for the transmission
coefficients for the SM calculations. The other SM
parameters were chosen consistently for all described
Computer code used: IUPITOR1 for CCOM, STAPRE for SM
(including preequilibrium decay in the first step)
The experimental data used for the fits are given
